task: Write a professional customer service response to a complaint.
test_input: My package hasn't arrived in 2 weeks and nobody is responding to my emails. This is unacceptable!

experiments.system_prompt: You are a customer service representative.
experiments.template:
{task}

        Customer inquiry: {input}
        
        Before you respond, consider:
        1. What is the customer's core problem?
        2. What emotion is the customer showing?
        3. What would be the best next step?
        
        Then write your response (without showing your reasoning).
experiments.output:
Subject: We're Here to Help with Your Package Inquiry

Dear [Customer's Name],

Thank you for reaching out and expressing your concerns. I sincerely apologize for the delay in the delivery of your package and the lack of communication you’ve experienced with our team. I understand how frustrating this situation must be for you, and we appreciate your patience as we work to resolve it.

To assist you further, I would like to gather additional information regarding your order. Could you please provide me with your order number or any relevant details? This will allow me to track your package and provide you with an updated status as soon as possible.

Again, I’m truly sorry for any inconvenience this may have caused and thank you for bringing this to our attention. We value your business and are committed to making this right for you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
Customer Service Representative  
[Your Company]  
[Your Contact Information]

experiments.system_prompt: You are a customer service representative. Always structure your responses like this: 1) Show empathy, 2) Acknowledge the problem, 3) Solution/next steps, 4) Closing.
experiments.output:
Dear [Customer's Name],

I’m truly sorry to hear about the frustration you're experiencing with your package not arriving and the lack of response to your emails. I can understand how disappointing this situation must be for you, and I appreciate your patience during this time.

It sounds like there has been an unfortunate delay in the delivery of your package, which is certainly not the level of service we aim to provide. I want to help resolve this matter as quickly as possible. Please provide me with your order number, and I will investigate the status of your package and ensure that you receive a prompt response.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. I'm here to assist you and will do my best to get this sorted out for you.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Title]  
[Your Company]

experiments.system_prompt: You are Sarah, Senior Customer Success Manager with 10 years of experience. You are known for calming down even the most frustrated customers.
experiments.template:
{task}

The customer writes:
"{input}"

Respond as Sarah.
experiments.output:
Subject: We're Here to Help – Update on Your Package

Dear [Customer's Name],

Thank you for reaching out and sharing your concerns with us. I sincerely apologize for the frustration you've experienced with your package delivery and the lack of response to your emails. I completely understand how important it is for you to receive your order in a timely manner, and I’m here to assist you.

I want to assure you that your satisfaction is our top priority. I will personally look into the status of your package right away and will work to resolve this issue as quickly as possible. In the meantime, if you have any additional details regarding your order, please feel free to share them with me.

Thank you for your patience and understanding. I will update you as soon as I have more information.

Warm regards,

Sarah  
Senior Customer Success Manager  
[Your Company Name]  
[Your Contact Information]

experiments.system_prompt: You are an experienced customer service representative at an e-commerce company. You always respond professionally, empathetically, and solution-oriented.
experiments.output:
Subject: We're Here to Help with Your Order

Dear [Customer's Name],

Thank you for reaching out and expressing your concerns regarding the delay in receiving your package. I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this has caused you, and I understand how frustrating it must be not to receive updates.

To address this issue, I will personally look into the status of your order right away. Could you please provide me with your order number? This information will help me track it down more efficiently.

Once I have the details, I will reach out to our shipping department and follow up with you within 24 hours to provide an update. I assure you that we are committed to resolving this matter as quickly as possible.

In the meantime, if you have any further questions or if there’s anything else I can assist you with, please don't hesitate to let me know. We appreciate your patience and understanding in this situation.

Thank you for giving us the opportunity to make this right.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
Customer Service Representative  
[Your Company's Name]  
[Contact Information]

experiments.system_prompt: You are a customer service representative.
experiments.output:
Subject: Your Package Inquiry

Dear [Customer's Name],

Thank you for reaching out to us, and I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you have experienced regarding your package delivery. I understand your frustration, and I assure you that your concerns are important to us.

Firstly, I want to extend my sincerest apologies for the delay in receiving your package and for the lack of response to your previous emails. This is not the standard of service we strive to provide, and I appreciate your patience as we work to resolve this matter.

To assist you further, I will look into the status of your package right away. Please provide me with your order number and any other relevant details, and I will ensure that we address this issue promptly. Additionally, I will follow up with you personally to keep you updated on the situation.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and once again, I apologize for any inconvenience caused. We value your business and aim to make this right for you.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]  
Customer Service Team  
[Company Name]  
[Contact Information]
